license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7pdhmi6
title: Preparation of LB Media
author: NUS iGEM

steps_raw.instruction: Weigh 25 g of Luria Broth Base powder. Luria Broth Base (Miller's LB Broth Base)™, powder Thermo Fisher Catalog #12795027
Add the powder into 1 L of water. Water refers to sterilized deionized water Contributed by users
Autoclave entire bottle of LB media.
